text_block_list.text:
One day, after we've reached a break in our
activities, we decide to use the coupon we won in
the raffle and visit a hot spring resort.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This inn features a "simple hot spring." This means
the waters are effective at soothing your nerves
and sore muscles, in addition to promoting
general good health.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They also offer nine different relaxation services,
including massages and aromatherapy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Dinner will be served banquet-style using
seasonal ingredients. The main course will be
premium teppanyaki wagyu beef.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This trip is to show you my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Ergo, my mission is to ensure you fully enjoy your
experience here.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It was necessary to conduct thorough preliminary
research in order to complete this mission.
Welcome to your vacation.

I head for the door, thinking of hitting the hot
spring first, but Mihono Bourbon shows no
indication of moving from where she's standing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No. It is not necessary for me to bathe on this
vacation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you encounter any sort of trouble, please
contact me and I will handle it.
choice_data_list: You should take it easy too.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is unexpected, but if that's your wish, then I
suppose...
I remind her of how hard we've both worked, and that seems to seal the deal for her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order acknowledged. Entering relaxation mode.
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Body temperature increase and comfort of both
body and mind obtained. Status—"relaxed."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I rate this hot spring to be quite high on the scale
of satisfaction.

We've got some time until dinner, so I invite her
to go for a walk so we can cool down after our
long soak.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Relaxing is quite "pleasant," Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Had you not suggested I "take it easy," I would
not have felt this wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, allow me to revise my statement. This was not
something achieved solely through today's
suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Over the years I have spent with you, I have
experienced many moments of "fun," "happiness,"
and "frustration."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I think that is precisely why I am now able to
detect all manner of feelings so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In the past, such emotions likely would have
passed over me without detection.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Gazing at the scenery while bathing in the hot
spring and being shrouded in its fragrance was
very "pleasant."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And being able to enjoy the night breeze with
you after my bath is "fun" and makes me "happy."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I would not have been able to understand these
rare and tender feelings as I was before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But now I can, and this change is all thanks to
you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. I fear I cannot explain it adequately, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I am around you, my emotions come more
easily.

Her expression is much gentler than usual as she
speaks.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... I am glad I met you, Trainer.

I sense that Mihono Bourbon and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
